width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgb(215, 242, 100); box-shadow: rgb(215, 242, 100) 0px 0px 14px; margin-right: 8px; }.sdk-status small { display: block; color: rgb(129, 151, 142); margin: 7px 0px 0px 19px; text-transform: none; letter-spacing: 0px; font-size: 10px; }main { min-width: 0px; }header { height: 72px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(207, 199, 185); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 0px 44px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.35); }header p { color: rgb(123, 116, 106); font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.12em; }header strong { color: rgb(18, 37, 30); }.avatar { width: 34px; height: 34px; border: 1px solid rgb(18, 37, 30); display: grid; place-items: center; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 900; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); }.page { padding: 46px 50px 70px; max-width: 1320px; margin: 0px auto; }.eyebrow, .tag { color: rgb(146, 117, 59); font-size: 10px; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.18em; }h1 { font-family: Georgia, "Times New Roman", serif; font-size: 46px; font-weight: 500; margin: 9px 0px 8px; letter-spacing: -0.035em; }.lede { color: rgb(112, 107, 99); margin: 0px 0px 34px; font-family: Georgia, serif; font-size: 17px; }.metric-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 18px; }.metric-grid article, .panel { background: rgb(255, 253, 248); border: 1px solid rgb(189, 180, 165); box-shadow: rgb(18, 37, 30) 4px 4px 0px; padding: 25px; }.metric-grid span, .order-list small { display: block; color: rgb(121, 113, 103); font-size: 9px; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.15em; }.metric-grid strong { display: block; font: 48px Georgia, serif; margin: 12px 0px 8px; }.metric-grid small { color: rgb(119, 112, 103); }.split { display: flex; align-items: end; justify-content: space-between; gap: 30px; padding: 30px; }.split h2 { font: 28px Georgia, serif; margin: 10px 0px; }.split p { max-width: 680px; color: rgb(104, 97, 89); line-height: 1.6; }.primary, .secondary { border: 1px solid rgb(18, 37, 30); padding: 13px 17px; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.1em; font-weight: 900; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; text-align: center; }.primary { color: rgb(18, 37, 30); background: rgb(215, 242, 100); box-shadow: rgb(18, 37, 30) 3px 3px 0px; }.primary:hover { background: rgb(229, 255, 128); }.secondary { background: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(18, 37, 30); }.wide { width: 100%; margin-top: 10px; }.inline { display: inline-block; margin-top: 20px; }.filters { display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 20px; }.filters input { flex: 1 1 0%; padding: 12px 14px; border: 1px solid rgb(170, 161, 149); background: rgb(255, 253, 248); }.filters button { padding: 0px 18px; border: 1px solid rgb(170, 161, 149); background: rgb(255, 253, 248); cursor: pointer; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 800; }.filters button.selected { background: rgb(18, 37, 30); color: white; }.product-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 18px; }.product { background: rgb(255, 253, 248); border: 1px solid rgb(189, 180, 165); }.product-art { height: 174px; display: grid; place-items: center; border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(189, 180, 165); }.product-art span { width: 76px; height: 76px; border: 1px solid rgb(18, 37, 30); border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4); display: grid; place-items: center; font: 38px Georgia, serif; }.product-copy { padding: 19px; }.product-copy small { font-size: 8px; letter-spacing: 0.11em; font-weight: 900; color: rgb(118, 111, 101); }.product-copy h2 { font: 22px Georgia, serif; margin: 7px 0px; }.product-copy p { color: rgb(106, 100, 91); font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.5; min-height: 38px; }.product-copy > div { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-top: 18px; }.product-copy button { border: 0px; background: rgb(18, 37, 30); color: white; padding: 9px 12px; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 900; cursor: pointer; }.checkout-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.3fr 0.8fr; gap: 22px; align-items: start; }.cart-line { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 54px 1fr auto 70px; align-items: center; gap: 14px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(216, 208, 196); padding: 15px 0px; }.swatch { width: 52px; height: 52px; display: grid; place-items: center; font: 22px Georgia, serif; border: 1px solid rgb(18, 37, 30); }.cart-line small { display: block; color: rgb(118, 111, 101); margin-top: 4px; }.stepper { display: flex; border: 1px solid rgb(170, 161, 149); }.stepper button, .stepper span { width: 30px; height: 30px; border: 0px; background: white; display: grid; place-items: center; }.stepper button { cursor: pointer; }.promo { display: flex; margin-top: 22px; }.promo input { flex: 1 1 0%; border: 1px solid rgb(170, 161, 149); padding: 11px; }.promo button { border: 0px; background: rgb(18, 37, 30); color: white; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 900; padding: 0px 16px; cursor: pointer; }.summary h2 { font: 25px Georgia, serif; margin-top: 0px; }.summary label { display: block; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.1em; margin: 13px 0px; }.summary label input { width: 100%; display: block; padding: 10px; border: 1px solid rgb(170, 161, 149); margin-top: 5px; background: white; }.summary p { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; color: rgb(102, 95, 87); }.summary .total { color: rgb(23, 23, 23); font-size: 20px; border-top: 1px solid rgb(170, 161, 149); padding-top: 15px; }.error-banner { background: rgb(255, 240, 237); border: 1px solid rgb(217, 88, 69); padding: 11px; margin: 13px 0px; color: rgb(148, 45, 29); }.error-banner span { display: block; font-size: 11px; margin: 3px 0px 8px; }.error-banner button { border: 0px; background: transparent; padding: 0px; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 900; cursor: pointer; }.empty { border: 1px dashed rgb(158, 149, 136); text-align: center; padding: 80px; }.empty h2 { font: 28px Georgia, serif; margin-bottom: 28px; }.order-list { padding: 0px 24px; }.order-list article { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 2fr 0.7fr 0.7fr 1fr; gap: 20px; align-items: center; padding: 22px 0px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(216, 208, 196); }.order-list article:last-child { border: 0px; }.order-list strong, .order-list span { display: block; margin-top: 4px; font-size: 12px; }.order-list > article > b { justify-self: end; color: rgb(121, 92, 0); background: rgb(255, 240, 181); padding: 7px 9px; font-size: 9px; letter-spacing: 0.08em; }.order-list > article > b.done { color: rgb(35, 91, 69); background: rgb(217, 244, 230); }button:disabled { opacity: 0.55; cursor: wait; }
